name: HZ-500

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: F660CDC2-1BFF-4E0C-9258-9BD59B32F996

comment: Antari HZ-500: HZ-500 is a game-changer with its built-in flight case, offering ultimate convenience and portability. A silent operation is its hallmark, making it perfect for noise-sensitive environments. This hazer-in-a-box boasts a new innovation, featuring dual haze nozzles for precision and power, setting a new standard in atmospheric effects.
